content:
# Total Dissolved Solids

**Summary**: A measure of the total amount of dissolved substances in water.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] measured total-dissolved-solids to assess salinity and mineral content.

## Scientific Context

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] TDS is a primary indicator of salinity and mineral content.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] Chemical analysis of groundwater samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The TDS of water samples collected from deep groundwater are very high, reaching 3796 ppm. ([[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011, p. 112]])
